title: lobelia sartorii
intro: Lobelia sartorii, also known as Chinese lobelia or Chinese pukeweed, is a flowering plant native to China and the Himalayas, belonging to the family Campanulaceae. Traditionally, Lobelia sartorii has been used for its medicinal properties, which include expectorant, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Lobelia sartorii include its ability to relieve anxiety and stress, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. Lobelia sartorii is commonly prepared as a tincture or infusion, and it can also be smoked or used in herbal cigarettes to relieve respiratory issues and promote relaxation.
